name: Glazed Stir-Fry Holiday Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red bell pepper, cut into one inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the vegetables and set aside.
2. Grate the lemon peel before squeezing the juice.
3. In a small bowl, combine sugar, grated lemon peel, lemon juice, soy sauce, and cornstarch. Stir in 1/2 cup water; set aside.
4. Heat oil in a large non-stick skillet. Add broccoli and bell pepper and stir-fry over high heat for 2 minutes.
5. If needed, add more oil to prevent sticking. Add jicama and continue cooking for 1 to 2 more minutes or until the vegetables are crisp-tender.
6. Pour the lemon mixture over the vegetables and continue cooking just until the glaze thickens.
7. Toss the vegetables to coat them thoroughly with the glaze.
8. Garnish with lemon zest.
9. Serve six half-cup portions.
Nutritional information per serving: 95 calories, 3g protein, 16g carbohydrate, 3g fat, 72mg sodium, 0 cholesterol.
